message:
Add Series.clip conformance test coverage

- Add SeriesClip operation to fp-conformance harness
- Add clip_lower/clip_upper fields to PacketFixture
- Create 3 test fixtures (both bounds, lower only, with nulls)
- Reuses execute_series_module_utility_fixture_operation infrastructure
